name: hisl-hackathon-project
description: Full-stack application with Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend

scripts.predev: pkill -f 'next-server' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'uvicorn' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo '✅ Cleaned up old processes'
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd .. && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
